description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 87.

Tier III: Arcane Marksman

Prerequisite: Sharpened Magic, Arcane Shield

Seeking Magic. Your spell attacks cannot be made at disadvantage. When you cast a spell that requires a spell attack roll, you can choose to treat the d20 roll as a 15 before adding your attack bonus. Once you use this feature, you cannot do so again until the start of your next turn. In addition, your critical range for spell attacks is increased by 1.

Arcane Damage Mastery. When you deal force damage, you can expend a spell slot to deal an additional amount of force damage equal to the spell slot expended x 5. You can now change the damage type of all your spells to force damage, regardless of their level.

Path Connections Archmagus. Instead of the Magical Geometry Heroic Perk, you can take the Erudition Perk, changing to the Archmagus path.

Legendary Psion. Instead of the Magical Geometry Heroic Perk, you can take the Mind Tricks Perk, changing to the Legendary Psion path.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
